events.name: Idea Created
events.description: Fired when a new idea is added to any project backlog

events.name: Task Completed
events.description: Fired when a dev task finishes in any project

events.name: Scan Completed
events.description: Fired when a codebase scan finishes with new ideas

events.name: Cross-Impact Detected
events.description: Fired when a change in one project may affect others

events.name: Dependency Drift
events.description: Fired when shared dependencies diverge across projects

events.name: Branch Created
events.description: Fired when an agent creates a new branch in a project

events.name: Tests Completed
events.description: Fired when test execution finishes for a project

events.name: Portfolio Health Changed
events.description: Fired when aggregate portfolio health score changes significantly

metadata.summary: Aggregate view across all Dev Tools projects. Provides cross-project impact analysis, unified code search, dependency graph comparison, an agent-driven implementation pipeline (branching, diffing, testing, committing), and portfolio-level intelligence (health scores, tech radar, risk matrix). Designed as a composable puzzle piece for agentic workflows.
